case_title: SUSAN E. GLASS-JOHNSON VS. GEORGE VALVERDE et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION, GEORGE VALVERDE, DMV DIRECTOR, STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES ONLY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-09-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR TRO AND PRELIM INJUNCTION, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLASS-JOHNSON, SUSAN E.

ORDER RE: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (HEARING ON 2/28/14 AT 9:30 AM IN D302, POS ON THE DIRECTOR OF THE DMV MUST BE DELIVERED TO THE COURT HEARING OSC ON 2/11/14 BY 4PM, OPPOSITION TO BE FILED/SERVED NO LATER THAN 2/19/14 BY 4PM, REPLY TO BE FILED/SERVED NO LATER THAN 2/24/14 BY 4PM.)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLASS-JOHNSON, SUSAN E. SERVED FEB-07-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-07-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 7, 2014. PLAINTIFF IS REQUESTED TO DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE EX PARTE APPLICATION FILED ON FEBRUARY 7, 2014 TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MARCH 3, 2014 AT 12:00 PM. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
***FEE PAID ON STIPULATION REGARDING WAIVER OF APPEARANCE*** FILED BY DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. AFTER HEARING, AND FOR GOOD CAUSE, THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WILL BE GRANTED UPON SUBMISSION BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL OF MISS GLASS-JOHNSON'S SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION ESTABLISHING OWNERSHIP OF THE SUBJECT VEHICLE. IN ADDITION, THE COURT SIGNED A STIPULATION RE WAIVER OF APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLE. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SET FOR FEB-28-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Off Calendar

Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Mar-07-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Joe Bravo, Esq. of Bravo & Margulies, Tel. 415.512.6700, for the plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was discussed. After hearing, and for good cause, the Court vacates its tentative ruling. The Order To Show Cause will be granted upon submission by plaintiff's counsel of Miss Glass-Johnson's supplemental declaration establishing ownership of the subject vehicle. In addition, the Court signed a stipulation re waiver of appearance by defendant State of California Department of Motor Vehicle. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Feb-28-2014 Continued To Mar-07-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Order To Show Cause is continued to March 7, 2014. Plaintiff is requested to deliver courtesy copies of the ex parte application filed on February 7, 2014 to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 3, 2014 at 12:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/PJB)
